description: The Horizon FD110 represents the next generation of luxury superyachts with stylish exterior lines, impressive interior volume and large outdoor spaces. This five-stateroom yacht features an on-deck deluxe master stateroom and plentiful dining and entertaining areas throughout. Offered in a Tri-Deck or Skyline configuration, the FD110 comfortably accommodates a crew of six in forward crew quarters with a large, fully equipped beach club aft. **Please note that this listing represents a model specification for a new build and not an actual hull for sale or vessel location. For more information on this model and build availability, please contact us**

Like all our legendary center consoles, once you get a chance to experience the 375 Nomad, your expectations are in for an array of very pleasant surprises. The console features a hidden head compartment with front/side entry, sink, and pull-out shower. At the push of a button, the self-actuating sole at the helm raises up 4” of additional height for maximum visibility. A fully customizable aft cockpit features our signature swing-hullside dive door and an incredible amount of storage spaces for fishboxes, baitwells, rod holders, or dive gear. Luxurious forward lounge seating provides the versatility of a high-low table that can sit flush with the cockpit, become a filler that creates a sunpad to complement the recliners, or raise to a full-height table for al fresco dining and cocktails that raise a toast to having all your wishes granted. Construction Guttered Cockpit Hatches with Self Bailing Cockpit Integrated Motor Bracket for Twin or Triple Engine Configurations Non-Skid Deck and Gunwales Non-Woven Quad and Uni-Directional Fibers Both Infused and Hand Laid PVC Foam Core Construction (wood free) FRP Infused Hull, Liner, and Deck Intrepid Hi-Flex White/White Gel Coat

The Neptunus 750F blends superior seakeeping with contemporary styling. This yacht was designed by Gregory C. Marshall, an award-winning naval architect. At Neptunus, you will find a team that is excited about working with you to tailor your new Neptunus 750F to your lifestyle and your boating needs. With every new build, we work closely with you on the layout, flow, form and function of your new yacht. Our customers develop a unique relationship with many of our employees during the design and construction of their yacht, and frequently comment on the warm reception they receive when working with the team at the Neptunus shipyard. Highlights Layouts for salon, dinette and galley are custom designed with you Available with either 3 or 4 staterooms Natural walnut woodwork throughout the yacht Custom flybridge hardtop, climate controlled bridge Ergonomically designed center helm with three custom-made helm chairs Dual Raymarine 16″ Axiom Multifunction Displays with ClearCruise Augmented Reality Raymarine Cyclone Pro Radar with Doppler target tracking and CHIRP, 96 NM, 4′ open array 15HP proportional bow and stern thrusters Wireless Yacht Controller Teak decking on flybridge, aft deck and exterior stairs Fully appointed crew’s quarters Resin infused hull with custom carbon fibre hardtop delivers a stronger and lighter vessel

2013 Regency 250 XP3 Party Barge Very clean boat for the year with a great layout and comfortable seating. Powered by a Mercury Verado 200HP 4 stroke outboard that runs strong and gives this boat plenty of power for cruising, tubing, and lake days with the family. 200HP Mercury Verado with 570 hours: Supercharged, incredibly quiet, and powerful. Well-maintained and runs smooth. XP3 Performance Package: Triple 26” pontoons with lifting strakes and an under-deck wave shield for superior handling and "planing" speed. Professionally installed, color-matched diamond plate reinforcement panels on the front fencing. These protect the boat from heavy bow-waves and "Lake Chop," ensuring the rails stay straight and dent-free. Raised helm Luxury Interior: High-back captain’s chairs, plush lounge seating, and premium marine vinyl. Smooth power steering Lowrance Elite 5 depth finder / GPS Boss Audio system w/ Bluetooth Nice analog/digital gauges Dedicated starboard refreshment center complete with a freshwater sink, on-demand water pump, a 13.5-gallon freshwater tank, and pull-out sprayer Rear area with extra storage Ski pole Bimini top Tons of storage throughout the boat Spacious and comfortable layout Custom cover to protect boat between outings Tandem Axle Trailer Included: Tows great and ready for the road. Great boat for the money and ready for the water. This is the perfect setup for someone who wants the comfort of a luxury pontoon with the power to pull tubes or cruise the main channel comfortably. Price: $31,000 Location: Kaiser, MO (Lake of the Ozarks) Accommodations Max seating is 15.

Whoever said you can't have it all, Never met this Beauty! What we have is a one owner 2018 Regal surf purchased new in 2020 from Arrowhead Marine on Grand Lake in Oklahoma. We have spared no expense maintaining this rig. What makes this boat special? It is an awesome package that keeps the entire family happy, especially the one paying the fuel bill. Unlike the multi hundred thousand dollar wake boats, we can rock the whole day on the on the lake with just 1 35-gallon tank of fuel! At 3,100 pounds, towing to and from the lake is a breeze and can be accomplished with a 1/2-ton pickup or Suv, no need for a dedicated heavy duty tow rig. The cockpit features "social "seating. the passenger back rest can be flipped for either forward or rear facing positions. While at rest the drives seat can be rotated to face the cockpit. The in-dash touchscreen is awesome and provides full integration of all systems. You have a customizable display with engine functions, A GPS navigation screen, engine diagnostics screen, full stereo controls, ability to add a video camera feed, and a dedicated surf screen to store your favorite rider profiles. The Fusion stereo features AM/FM and blue tooth capabilities. 4 cockpit speakers supply the sound for passengers, while 2 Kenwood amplified tower speakers send the sound waves back to the rider. The 200 hp V-6 features a closed loop cooling system, much like the radiator on your car. This keeps the lake water out of your engine, instead circulating it through a heat exchanger. The system has a freshwater flush feature that makes after use maintenance a breeze. The system also has an EZ-Drain, that allows the heat exchanger to be drained in seconds, with no tools required. Winterizing has never been easier! We have a battery disconnect switch installed to isolate the entire electrical system while not in use. We added the Bimini top and Monster tower, which has two removable board racks, one that has an added feature that allows it to swivel inward to make access even simpler. Each rack is designed to hold 1 surfboard and 1 wake board, or two wake boards. We use FAT SACS for ballast, the in-floor ski locker gets a 650-pound sac that is filled and emptied with a portable pump. We have an additional 155-pound sac we can deploy based on the daily activities and passenger load. You will see this ballast bag in several pictures attached on the swim step. The trailer was custom made by EZE Loader, it is equiped with Vault oil bath hubs for long life and ease of service. We replaced the bunks and carpet in 2024, along with ditching the bias ply tires and opting for trailer designed radials. We also added a spare tire mount and complete spare. The trailer also features surge brakes and LED lighting. We have a custom Sunbrella travel cover as well. As you can see in the pictures, with the tower folded down the boat will fit in my everyday run of the mill garage. At the time of the pictures, she had 178 hours on the clock, we did go out a few more times and I completely forgot to grab the engine hours before we shrink wrapped it for the winter. My guess is around 184 hours. Why are we selling? We bought this boat so we could focus on family time with the kids while they were still in high school. They are all off either in college or living their lives out of state, so usage will be limited to just my wife and I. Being a boat lover this rig deserves to be used not sitting under cover. I would describe her as overall in excellent condition. Washed and cleaned after every outing, waxed annually, and treated like one of the family. Regal only made this model for 3 years and they rarely come up for sale. Don't miss your chance at a wonderful memory maker for your family. Boat is located in Salina Kansas, at the intersections of interstate 70 and 135. 5/03 update. removed shrink wrap yesterday and checked hours. She is sitting at 183.5 hours. The boating season is upon us! I am going to drop the price to $39,999 to help motivate you.

Designed for maximum interaction, the massive twin-tip bow and ample main lounge holds sixteen friends. Transform the seats and store everything. Convert the sunpad into a transom observatory. Then hit the water with 805 pounds of hard tank ballast, and discharge the good times. FOR SALE: 2000 Sunsation 32 Dominator – Extraordinary Condition Experience the pinnacle of high-performance offshore boating with this meticulously maintained Sunsation 32 Dominator. This is not your average performance boat; it is a semi-custom, hand-built machine known for its stability and "wave-crushing" double-stepped hull. Performance & Power Twin Engines: Dual 454 Magnum MPI powerplants. Horsepower: 385 HP per side (770 total HP). 495 engine hours . Drives: Reliable Bravo stern drives Kplanes and labed stainless propellers. Performance: Expertly engineered for high-speed thrills while maintaining the comfort Sunsation is famous for. Elite Custom Styling Exterior: Stunning custom paint by the legendary Mitcher T.. Known for his world-class attention to detail, this paint job provides exceptional shine and head-turning appeal on the water. Interior: Premium McCloud (McLeod) interior featuring power drop-down bolster seats for maximum security and comfort at high speeds. Condition & Features Condition: Extraordinary. Meticulously cared for, showing pride of ownership in every detail. Cabin: Spacious cuddy cabin with salon seating, V-berth sleeper, enclosd pump out head and sink perfect for overnight trips. Trailer Included: Comes with a matching custom tri-axle trailer for easy transport and a complete, coordinated look at the ramp. Why This Boat? Sunsation Dominators are renowned for their agility and responsive performance. With the iconic Mitcher T. paint and McCloud interior, this vessel represents a "collector’s dreamboat" that offers both speed and luxury. Freshwater boat used only on Tablerock lake. This 2004 Gibson 44' Classic is as close to like new condition as you will find anywhere. Extremely low hours on the engines and generator. She has spent her whole life under a full covered slip and was waxed on a regular basis. NO oxidation what so ever. This boat is a must see to believe. The current dock that it is in is for sale or lease. Accommodations This Gibson houseboat will sleep 6 comfortablely with two heads. Full dinette in the main salon with an elegant black sofa. This is a very comfortable boat with everything you need to cruise for the day or take the long range trip you have always dreamed of taking. The Sylvan Mirage 8524 CLZ pontoon embodies the essence of family-friendly boating with its versatile design and thoughtful features. Its rear flip-back seating offers the ultimate flexibility, ideal for rear-facing lounging during relaxed days at the sandbar or forward-facing positioning for captivating sunset cruises. This pontoon seamlessly combines comfort and functionality, ensuring that every moment on the water is enjoyed to the fullest by the whole family. Whether you're seeking leisurely relaxation or exciting adventures, the Sylvan Mirage 8524 CLZ pontoon provides the perfect platform for creating cherished memories on the water. The Sylvan Mirage 820 Cruise is the epitome of comfort and convenience, providing an ideal setting for memorable moments on the water. Its traditional rear L-group seating creates a relaxed and inviting atmosphere, perfect for lively conversations and bonding with friends and family. Meanwhile, the two front couches offer additional seating space and a prime vantage point for taking in the scenic views. Complementing these features is the full fiberglass console, complete with ample storage to keep essentials organized and easily accessible throughout the journey. The bimini top provides essential shade on sunny days, ensuring everyone onboard stays comfortable. With its thoughtful design and array of amenities, the Sylvan Mirage 820 Cruise sets the stage for unforgettable experiences, whether it's a leisurely cruise around the lake or a gathering of loved ones enjoying each other's company. The X80 brings the flowing design and beautifully sculpted surfaces of the X Class to an 80ft (25.1m) yacht – one whose Super Flybridge adds 30% more useful interior space than a traditional flybridge yacht of this length. The Super Flybridge adds significantly more indoor and outdoor space, this enables the X Class to set a new benchmark for luxury living spaces. And with the freedom to travel exceptionally long distances, you can keep exploring new horizons. Bringing the outside in with glazing that flows the entire length of the main deck, encasing the saloon, galley and forward dining area. The use of light and innovative design continues below deck, where eight guests can be accommodated across four en-suite cabins: a full beam master stateroom located amidships, a forward guest stateroom, a double guest to starboard and a twin cabin to port. The crew quarters, located aft of the main accommodation, can accommodate three crew with the standard layout. There’s also the option to include a main deck master stateroom with a private owner’s sundeck. And with the option of a long-range 7,000 litre tank, you can continue the adventure further afield.

The 38 GLS OB combines the unmatched performance and entertainment capabilities of the 38 GLS with powerful, easy-to-maintain outboards. Expand your swimming area by lowering the side of the 38 GLS to convert it into a swim platform. The lower cabin features an aft stateroom and U-shaped dinette that converts into a berth. A full galley and standing head with shower complete this extraordinary yacht. It’s a match made in heaven for lovers of on-the-water fun.

Bringing the design language and superior quality of the Y Class range to a 72-foot yacht, the Y72 has a sense of refinement throughout, with elegant surfaces in every area creating a clean, contemporary aesthetic.

The Sunreef 80 is an all-around luxury sailing catamaran that boasts a seamless combination of exterior and interior spaces that flow effortlessly into one another. The clever bridge deck and superstructure design offer an exceptional level of onboard comfort, while generous natural wood finishes, high bulwarks, and graceful lines reflect a modern style imbued with classic elegance. With a completely fresh superstructure concept, the 80ft yacht evolves even further, embracing design enhancements inspired by the brand’s forward-looking Sunreef NEXT vision. This electric sailing catamaran now features a saloon plan with outstanding customization potential. A vast, central lounging area delivers panoramic views and endless configuration options. It opens gracefully onto both the bow terrace and the aft cockpit, inviting an immersive onboard experience. The bow section now benefits from a thoughtfully redesigned lounge space. Owners can choose between reshaped trampolines for a classic sailing feel or opt for luxurious sun pads to create a tranquil front terrace, perfectly shielded from sun and wind — tailored for any mood or moment. To the aft, the saloon blends into a generous cockpit, which is now more expansive than ever thanks to a shortened superstructure and optimized design flow. This space is further extended by a large aft platform, not only ideal for tender storage but also connected to the enhanced Ocean Lounge. Here, innovative folding platforms create a sprawling relaxation zone, while a cleverly integrated garage beneath the sofa discreetly houses a jet ski — maximizing storage without compromising comfort. Below deck, the hulls provide expansive volumes that support a fully bespoke layout, allowing for limitless possibilities in crafting sophisticated and functional yacht interiors. What truly enhances the sailing experience is the commitment to sustainability. The Sunreef 80 Eco is a silent catamaran, powered by clean propulsion and advanced energy systems – marking a bold leap forward in sustainable yachting. Available in classic and solar, the Sunreef 80 delivers a blend of yachting innovation, elegance, and eco-conscious cruising for the modern sailor.
